title: 北朝鮮女子サッカーチーム 韓国到着 南北対戦へ

title: ロシア プーチン大統領 今月19日から中国訪問 大統領府が発表
snippet: ロシア大統領府は、プーチン大統領が今月19日から20日まで中国を訪問し、習近平国家主席と首脳会談を行うと発表しました。両首脳は先の米中首脳会談を踏まえ、ウクライナやイランの情勢をめぐっても議論するとみ…

title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo an international emergency
snippet: The agency added that the outbreak, with around 246 cases and 80 deaths, does not meet the criteria of pandemic emergency.

title: How worrying is the Ebola outbreak in DR Congo?
snippet: An outbreak in DR Congo has been declared a health emergency, with almost 250 suspected cases reported.

title: Large-scale Ukrainian drone attack kills three in Moscow region, says Russia
snippet: Ukraine's president says the strikes are a "justified" response to deadly Russian attacks on Ukrainian cities.

snippet: The country is investigating the source of the strike, which it calls a "dangerous escalation".

title: Man drives car into pedestrians in Italy, injuring eight

snippet: BBC Verify has examined dozens of videos of fibre-optic drone attacks carried out by the Lebanese armed group.

title: Taiwan insists it is independent after Trump warning
snippet: Fresh from his summit in Beijing, the US president warned against a formal declaration of independence by the island.

title: Trump-backed challenger defeats Republican senator who voted to convict president
snippet: Trump threw his full support behind Julia Letlow in Louisiana's high-stakes contest, branding the incumbent "disloyal".

title: Canadian from hantavirus-hit cruise ship tests positive
snippet: The individual is one of four former passengers on the MV Hondius isolating on Vancouver Island, British Columbia.

title: Rescue diver dies during search for bodies of Italians who drowned in Maldives caves
snippet: Staff Sgt Mohamed Mahdhee died while diving in the search-and-rescue operation, the Maldives government tells the BBC.

title: Toddlers among more than 50 schoolchildren kidnapped in Nigeria
snippet: No group has yet claimed responsibility for the attacks, which have devastated Mussa town in Borno state.

snippet: Wildlife experts had previous criticised the operation, saying it would only cause the animal more distress.
